text:
Interns making real impact
Overview
The Stockpile Systems Mission Center provides systems leadership for the ongoing stewardship of the U.S. nuclear weapons stockpile and ensures a safe, secure, and effective nuclear deterrent by adhering to the “Always/Never” imperative – that when authorized, nuclear weapons will function with very high reliability and will never function under any other conditions.
Stockpile Systems projects focus on extended refurbishment and re-evaluation of component efficiencies in various weapons and weapon subsystems, to include analysis of performance data captured through a variety of tests. Every component, including circuits and wires, goes through rigorous testing and simulation modeling to ensure its reliability and efficiency in Stockpile Systems’ efforts.
Stockpile Systems interns are part of a Sandia program, MissionTech, which offers students valuable cross-exposure to projects in ND Mission Technologies mission centers.
What You Gain
Experience with high-rigor qualification and validation activities
Extended knowledge of high-reliability component characterization and surety
Risk identification and mitigation skills
A professional network of fellow interns from around the nation through fun events and activities
All Sandia internships are made possible by a stipend and serve as a direct pipeline to full-time employment at the Labs. Sandia Internships also offer a variety of benefits, from flexible work schedules to health and wellness, to co-op opportunities. Interns work as integrated members of their teams alongside experienced mentors to produce project deliverables, and past interns have published research papers alongside their Sandia teams.
Project Types
Component modeling and simulation
System engineering design and qualification
Non-nuclear subsystem and components integration
Refurbishment and re-evaluation of component efficiencies
Test data acquisition, analysis, and exploitation
Program Details
Application procedure
Use Sandia’s Careers tool to create a username and password.
Enter “MissionTech” into the Keywords text field, and click Search.
Browse the list of MissionTech intern openings.
Complete an online application for a specific intern opening
Detailed instructions for using Sandia’s Career tool to apply for a position are also available.
All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or veteran status and any other protected class under state or federal law.
Sandia invites you to review the Equal Employment Opportunity posters which include EEO is the Law, EEO is the Law Poster Supplement, and Pay Transparency Nondiscrimination Provision.
